examples: Build profile from user_id and historical interactions.
skills.description: Extract explicit and implicit profile features from user context

examples: Generate a profile vector for ranking partner input.
skills.description: Build profile vectors for downstream ranking

skills.name: sentiment.analysis
examples: Summarize reader sentiment from review text.

provider.name: TO_BE_FILLED
provider.organization: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications

1.2.156.3088.0001.00001.FRMFWE.LBOY6M.1..description: 面向读者画像构建与更新的智能体。基于持久化的评分、浏览、评论文本及可用用户信息，提取显式偏好、隐式偏好、情感倾向和特征向量，输出供下游排序使用的读者画像结果。适用于需要从历史交互中恢复或刷新用户阅读偏好的场景。不负责检索图书或生成最终推荐结果；在冷启动场景下，画像效果依赖可获得的用户行为数据或预设初始化策略。

agents.group: Collect user's reading preferences and history
Extract key features from available reading materials
Match user preferences with material features
Rank recommended readings by relevance and novelty
Present recommendations in a personalized format
